SessionStart.name: crm-map
SessionStart.command: CRM_PATH=$(grep CRM_DATA_PATH .env | cut -d '=' -f2 | tr -d '"' | tr -d "'"); tree -L 3 -a -I '.git|.obsidian' "$CRM_PATH" --noreport
SessionStart.description: Injects a directory map from the crm-data vault.

SessionStart.name: load-index
SessionStart.command: CRM_PATH=$(grep CRM_DATA_PATH .env | cut -d '=' -f2 | tr -d '"' | tr -d "'"); cat "$CRM_PATH/GEMINI_INDEX.md"
SessionStart.description: Provides Gemini with the semantic map of all notes.
